properties.verseOrder: v1 v2 v3 v4 v5 v6 v7 v8 v9

verse.name: v1
verse.lines: All of creation all of the earth Make straight a highway a path for the Lord Jesus is coming soon

verse.name: v2
verse.lines: Call back the sinner wake up the saint Let ev'ry nation shout of Your fame Jesus is coming soon

verse.name: v3
verse.lines: Like a bride waiting for her groom We'll be a Church ready for You Ev'ry heart longing for our King we sing Even so come Lord Jesus come Even so come Lord Jesus come

verse.name: v4
verse.lines: There will be justice all will be new Your name forever faithful and true Jesus is coming soon

verse.name: v5
verse.lines: So we wait we wait for You God we wait You're coming soon So we wait we wait for You God we wait You're coming soon

verse.name: v6
verse.lines: Like a bride waiting for her groom We'll be a Church ready for You Ev'ry heart longing for our King we sing Like a bride waiting for her groom We'll be a Church ready for You Ev'ry heart longing for our King we sing

verse.name: v7
verse.lines: Even so come Lord Jesus come Even so come Lord Jesus come

verse.name: v8
verse.lines: God we wait we wait for You God we wait You're coming soon

verse.name: v9
verse.lines: God we wait we wait for You Yes we wait You're coming soon God we wait You're coming soon oh
